summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blendlink PKO Poker Tournament system. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified via Playwright - poker lobby, tournament creation, bot addition, and game table all working correctly. AI bots make automatic decisions (fold, call, raise, check) during gameplay. Game phases progress correctly (pre_flop -> flop -> turn -> river -> showdown).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/poker/tournaments - List available tournaments
Backend: GET /api/poker/my-tournament - Check player tournament status
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/create - Create new tournament
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/register - Register for tournament
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/add-bots - Add AI bots
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/{id}/force-start - Force start tournament
Backend: GET /api/poker/tournaments/{id} - Get tournament state
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/action - Player actions (fold/call/raise/check)
Backend: POST /api/poker/tournaments/leave - Leave tournament during registration
Backend: GET /api/poker/leaderboard - Get poker leaderboard
Backend: Full game flow - create -> register -> add bots -> start -> play
Backend: Bot AI makes decisions automatically
Backend: Game phase progression (pre_flop -> flop -> turn -> river)
Frontend: Poker lobby loads at /poker with data-testid
Frontend: Create Tournament button works
Frontend: Tournament registration redirects to game page
Frontend: Add Bots buttons work (+1 Bot, +3 Bots, Fill with Bots)
Frontend: Poker table displays all 10 player seats
Frontend: Player info shows chips, bounty, username, avatar
Frontend: Dealer/SB/BB position indicators display correctly
Frontend: Action buttons (Fold, Check, Raise, All In) present
Frontend: Bet slider with min/max values
Frontend: Tournament info panel (Players, Blinds, Prize Pool, Level)
Frontend: Table Chat feature available
Frontend: Rebuys available indicator
Frontend: WebSocket connection for real-time updates
critical_code_review_comments: Poker tournament uses in-memory storage - tournaments are cleared on backend restart (by design for testing)
AI bot decision engine implements multiple personalities (tight-aggressive, loose-aggressive, tight-passive, loose-passive, balanced)
Bot skill levels (medium, hard, expert) affect decision variance
PKO (Progressive Knockout) bounty system correctly implemented - 50% immediate payout, 50% added to winner's bounty
Hand evaluation correctly handles all poker hands from high card to royal flush
Side pot calculation implemented for all-in scenarios
Added force-leave endpoint for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: PKO Poker Tournament fully tested and working: 1) Poker lobby at /poker shows available tournaments with Join buttons, 2) Create Tournament creates new table and auto-registers creator, 3) Add Bots fills table with AI opponents (9 unique bot names with different personalities), 4) Force Start begins tournament with 2+ players, 5) AI bots make automatic decisions (fold/call/raise/check) with 0.5-1.5s think delay, 6) Game phases progress correctly through pre_flop -> flop -> turn -> river -> showdown, 7) Hand evaluation and pot distribution working, 8) WebSocket provides real-time game state updates, 9) Action buttons and bet slider functional, 10) Tournament info panel shows blinds/prize pool/level. Note: Tournaments are stored in-memory and cleared on backend restart.
